Notes: NSIC/Sanford Health Basketball Tournament first round...
Concordia is ranked #20 in WBCA DII Top-25, on a 14-game win streak...
Concordia has won 19 of last 20 games and is No. 1 seed from South Division...
Concordia will play No. 4 seed Northern State Sat, Mar 2, 8pm at Gangelhoff
